name: Jellied Venison Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked, diced, leftover roast of venison
2 tbsp Pimiento, cut in small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in cold water.
2. Dissolve bouillon cube and gelatin in boiling water.
3. Add vinegar and salt to the mixture.
4. Cool the mixture until it just begins to set.
5. Add the remaining ingredients: diced cooked venison, chopped green pepper, pimiento, pickles, celery, onion, and green beans.
6. Pour the mixture into individual molds or a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
7. Chill and serve on a bed of lettuce with mayonnaise.
